'''Chitliks''' were burrowing [[marsupial]]s found on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. They lived in caves and had orange stripes. The [[Gender/Legends|females]] produced a salubrious [[Milk/Legends|milk]] called [[kista]].

[[Cestian]]s would set traps for chitliks in order to harvest the kista from their mammary glands. The kista would be milked and then the chitliks would be released.

One notable chitlik was [[Pocket]], the pet of [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] [[Natasi Daala]]'s aide, [[Wynn Dorvan]]. Another was [[Tamac's Zantay Aura]], the winner of "Most Placid in Show" at the [[Sok Brok's Fiftieth Annual Pet Show]].
